# Car Glass Windscreens NZ

## Business Description
Car Glass Windscreens NZ is a professional mobile windscreen replacement and auto glass repair company serving Auckland, Rodney, Franklin, and Christchurch. We provide 24/7 emergency services and direct-bill most major insurance companies.

## Services
- Windscreen replacement (broken and cracked windscreens)
- Stone chip repair
- Side and rear window replacement
- Door glass and quarter glass replacement
- Mobile on-site installation
- Insurance claim processing and direct billing
- Truck and commercial vehicle glass replacement
- Private work and WINZ quotes

## Service Areas
- Auckland (greater Auckland area)
- Rodney (north of Auckland)
- Silverdale
- Manukau
- Franklin (south of Auckland)
- Christchurch

## Vehicle Makes Serviced
We provide windscreen and glass replacement for all major vehicle manufacturers including:
Audi, Alfa Romeo, Austin, Bentley, BMW, Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, Chrysler, Citroen, Daewoo, Daihatsu, Daimler, Dodge, Fiat, Ford, Holden, Honda, Hyundai, Isuzu, Jaguar, Jeep, Jensen, Kia, Land Rover, Lexus, Lotus, Mazda, Maserati, Mercedes, Mitsubishi, Morris, Nissan, Opel, Peugeot, Pontiac, Porsche, Proton, Range Rover, Renault, Rolls Royce, Rover, Saab, Skoda, Ssangyong, Subaru, Suzuki, Toyota, Triumph, Valiant, Volkswagen, Volvo.

## Insurance Partners
We direct-bill the following insurance companies: AA Insurance, AMI Insurance, AMP, Aon, Aon Style Cover, Ansvar, Autosure, Camper Care, China Insurance, Covi, QBE, FMG, Go Insurance, IAG, IUA, Lantern, Lumley, Mainstream, Medical Assurance, Motor & General, NAC, National Auto Club, Prestigio, Protecta, New India, NZI, ANDO, State Insurance, Swan, Vero, Zurich.

We also handle bank insurance (ANZ, ASB, BNZ, Kiwi Bank, National, PSIS, Westpac, Credit Union) and broker insurance.

- Phone: 0800 611-731 (24/7 emergency)
- Email: tiptopautonz@hotmail.com
- Head Office: 133 Pilkington Road, Panmure, Auckland
- Postal: P O Box 51-737, Pakuranga, Auckland

## Business Hours
24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including public holidays.

## Pricing
Most insurance glass claims have no excess, meaning no cost to the customer. Private work and WINZ quotes are available on request.
